creator: freebsd@schleifer.org
text:
Diff for /ports/devel/libmonetra/pkg-plist between versions 1.8 and 1.9 removes the file causing the conflict: include/proxy.h 

Need to have conflict tag removed from Makefiles

Fix: 

Remove CONFLICT tags from: 

ports/devel/libmonetra/Makefile
ports/net/libproxy/Makefile
